title: Fresh Fruit Tray with French Cream for a Party
ingredients: Red leaf lettuce, for lining tray
instructions: Arrange prepared fruit attractively on a platter lined with red leaf lettuce.
In a separate bowl, whip cream with granulated sugar until soft peaks form.
Fold whipped cream into cream cheese mixture.
Thin with pineapple juice as needed to reach a smooth, dippable consistency.
notes: Served at Katie and Patrick's wedding reception.
source_file: Fresh Fruit Tray with French Cream for a Party.docx
